title: The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act (CAITA) protects consumers by giving them the ability to determine if materials have been generated by AI
prompt_preview:

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act (CAITA) requires large generative artificial intelligence system providers to label AI-generated images, videos, and audio with visible and imperceptible disclosures.",
    "CAITA provides an AI-detection tool for users to query whether content was created by AI.",
    "CAITA enforces third-party licensees to prevent undisclosed content publication to the extent technically feasible.",
    "AI-generated images, audio, and video could be used for spreading political misinformation and creating deepfakes.",
    "CAITA addresses the growing influence of AI in product creation and ensures that consumers have the information they need to make informed choices.",
    "CAITA emphasizes the importance of disclosure and consumer awareness regarding AI-generated products.",
    "CAITA sets a precedent for other states and jurisdictions to follow regarding guidelines for AI-generated products."
  ]
}
```
